generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring temperature in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring occupancy in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring lighting levels in the physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator within the Building Control System for managing building operations"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller within the Building Control System for managing building operations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization via Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance BuildingOperationsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for decision support and life cycle management"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualComfortAssessmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, BuildingOperationsSimulationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, BuildingOperationsSimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) tools for semantic modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingOperationsSimulationService, VisualComfortAssessmentService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) techniques for automated deployment and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingOperationsSimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustments"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect management"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata, sensor configurations, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance RuntimeArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representations transformed into runtime artifacts using Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE
]

instance GeometricData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Geometric data integrated with real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance SpatialData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Spatial data integrated with real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance FunctionalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Functional data integrated with real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted from physical building to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via MQTT protocols using Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware, including device-specific metadata (tenant ID, endpoint addresses) for bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure, specifically a Living Lab case study, serving as the physical counterpart for the Digital Twin, representing real-world assets through unified virtual representations for simulation, analysis, and optimization throughout the building life cycle"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin and sent to Building Control System (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling automated adjustments to physical systems based on virtual simulations and analytics."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization, with data updates and control actions occurring continuously to maintain accurate alignment between the physical building and its digital counterpart, as evidenced by real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for custom services; orchestrated through roles of Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all phases of the building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment, with the Digital Twin representing the 'as operated' state through real-time monitoring and control of physical assets."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness; synchronization techniques to prevent semantic drift between digital models and physical counterparts, ensuring alignment over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication protocols via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards, with standardized extension points for service integration and Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols for interoperable data exchange across heterogeneous systems."
]
